gpt55_review_summary: Pending GPT-5.5 reviewer pass for PR #315.
verification: changed-file credential-pattern scan found only existing redacted placeholders; no literal Databricks tokens or concrete workspace URLs
what_changed: Added runner-level vLLM runtime preflight arguments to Databricks engine-probe jobs and execute the strict preflight before native probes.
Made release-safe provider-backed vLLM Databricks configs fail closed unless they carry preflight output and layer-name JSON inputs.
Threaded the same preflight fields through benchmark-plan engine-probe target JSON and documented the g6 QA handoff path.
why: The next provider-backed vLLM Databricks QA run must fail before GPU probe execution when the installed vLLM contract, provider factory, or layer mapping is not strict enough for release evidence.
